name: FONDUL PROPRIETATEA S.A. GDR (E
summary: FONDUL PROPRIETATEA S.A. GDR (E) is a closed-end investment company established in Romania to provide compensation to individuals whose properties were confiscated by the communist regime. The company invests primarily in Romanian equities, including utilities, oil and gas, and financial institutions, aiming to maximize returns for its shareholders. Its headquarter is in Bucharest, Romania
